rationale: REGRESSION on eval-002 (polygon extrusion). Despite winning 2 evals (001, 005) and tying 2 (003, 004), iteration 001 LOST on eval-002 which is marked regression_critical. The baseline shows a correct 3D extruded column over Colorado; iteration 001 renders only a flat 2D polygon — the extrusion was lost. The proposer's changes to height/clampToGround guidance likely caused the code generator to use height:0 without extrudedHeight being rendered properly (possibly a camera angle issue or the outline-fix guidance interfered with the extrusion pattern). Per regression policy: any critical regression = DISCARD.

critical_regression.description: 3D polygon extrusion lost — flat polygon rendered instead of 100,000m extruded column
critical_regression.root_cause_hypothesis: Proposer added guidance to use height:0 instead of clampToGround for outline visibility. This may have confused the code generator into setting height:0 without proper extrudedHeight rendering, or the camera flyTo rectangle framing doesn't show the extrusion from the right angle.

improvements_noted: eval-001: Global landmark view dramatically improved (all 3 points with labels visible)
eval-005: Airport labels added, better camera framing with isShowing filter
next_iteration_guidance: Preserve the eval-001 camera framing fix and eval-005 isShowing filter, but fix the polygon extrusion regression. The height:0 vs clampToGround guidance needs to be scoped to GeoJSON/ground-clamped polygons specifically, not applied broadly to all polygon examples.
